title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at PropTiger
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? PropTiger in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!
